debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
hPerm : l1.Perm l2
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 ≤ l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 ≤ l2.length
elt : α
⊢ (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt)

proof:
have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i ≤ l.length) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp at h; subst h; simp
        | cons hd tl ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i =>
            simp
            exact (List.Perm.cons hd (ih i (Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ h))).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)
failed_attempts:
let rec aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) :=
        match l, i with
        | [], _ => List.Perm.refl _
        | _ :: _, 0 => List.Perm.refl _
        | y :: ys, i+1 => (List.Perm.cons y (aux ys i)).trans (List.Perm.swap elt y ys)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).trans ((hPerm.cons _).trans (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).symm)

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i ≤ l.length) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => cases i <;> simp
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i =>
            simp
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih i (Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ hi))).trans (List.Perm.swap elt x xs)
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp [List.insertIdx]; apply List.Perm.refl
        | cons h t ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]; apply List.Perm.refl
          | succ i =>
            simp [List.insertIdx]
            exact List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.cons h (ih i)) (List.Perm.swap h elt t)
      exact List.Perm.trans (aux l1 idx1) (List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm) (List.Perm.symm (aux l2 idx2)))

let aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i ≤ l.length) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil =>
          rw [Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero h]
          simp; apply List.Perm.refl
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp; apply List.Perm.refl
          | succ i =>
            simp
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih i (Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ h))).trans (List.Perm.swap elt x xs)
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)

let aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        rw [List.insertIdx, List.splitAt]
        conv => rhs; rw [← List.take_append_drop i l]
        simp only [List.append_assoc, List.cons_append]
        apply List.Perm.append_right
        apply List.perm_append_comm
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => cases i <;> simp [List.insertIdx]
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i <;> simp [List.insertIdx]
          exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih _)).trans (List.Perm.swap x elt xs)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)

apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_insertIdx idx1 l1 elt)
      apply List.Perm.trans (hPerm.cons elt)
      apply List.Perm.symm
      apply List.perm_insertIdx idx2 l2 elt

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => cases i <;> simp [List.insertIdx] <;> apply List.Perm.refl
        | cons h t IH =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]; apply List.Perm.refl
          | succ n =>
            simp [List.insertIdx]
            exact (List.Perm.cons h (IH n)).trans (List.Perm.swap h elt t)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp
        | cons x xs ih => cases i <;> simp; exact (ih _).cons x |>.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans <| hPerm.cons elt |>.trans (aux l2 idx2).symm

trans elt :: l1
      · exact List.perm_insertIdx hidx1 elt
      · trans elt :: l2
        · exact List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
        · exact (List.perm_insertIdx hidx2 elt).symm

trans elt :: l1
      · exact List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _
      · trans elt :: l2
        · exact List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
        · exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).symm

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp [List.insertIdx]
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i <;> simp [List.insertIdx]
          exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih _)).trans (List.Perm.swap x elt xs)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)

have h (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        rw [List.insertIdx]
        trans elt :: (l.take i ++ l.drop i)
        · apply List.perm_middle
        · rw [List.take_append_drop]
      exact (h l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (h l2 idx2).symm)

apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _)
      apply List.Perm.trans (hPerm.cons elt)
      apply List.Perm.symm
      apply List.perm_insertIdx

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp [List.insertIdx]; exact List.Perm.refl _
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i
          · simp [List.insertIdx]; exact List.Perm.refl _
          · simp [List.insertIdx]
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih _)).trans (List.Perm.swap elt x xs)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i ≤ l.length) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp [List.insertIdx]
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]
          | succ i =>
            simp [List.insertIdx]
            exact (ih i (Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ h)).cons x |>.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).trans (hPerm.cons elt |>.trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp [List.insertIdx]
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i <;> simp [List.insertIdx]
          exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih _)).trans (List.Perm.swap x elt xs)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)

trans elt :: l1
      · apply List.perm_insertIdx; try assumption
      · trans elt :: l2
        · apply List.Perm.cons; assumption
        · symm; apply List.perm_insertIdx; try assumption

apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_insertIdx l1 idx1 elt)
      apply List.Perm.trans (hPerm.cons elt)
      exact List.Perm.symm (List.perm_insertIdx l2 idx2 elt)

trans elt :: l1
    · exact List.perm_insertIdx hidx1
    · trans elt :: l2
      · exact List.Perm.cons elt hPerm
      · exact (List.perm_insertIdx hidx2).symm

let rec go (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i =>
            simp [List.insertIdx]
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih i)).trans (List.Perm.swap elt x xs)
      exact (go l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (go l2 idx2).symm)

apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_insertIdx elt l1 idx1)
      apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm)
      apply List.Perm.symm
      apply List.perm_insertIdx elt l2 idx2

trans elt :: l1
      · exact List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _
      · trans elt :: l2
        · exact List.Perm.cons _ hPerm
        · exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).symm
exact (List.perm_insertIdx hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx hidx2).symm)

let lem (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp [List.insertIdx]; apply List.Perm.refl
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]; apply List.Perm.refl
          | succ n => simp [List.insertIdx]; exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih n)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      exact (lem l1 idx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (lem l2 idx2).symm)

apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_insertIdx l1 idx1 elt)
      apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm)
      apply List.Perm.symm (List.perm_insertIdx l2 idx2 elt)

apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_insertIdx l1 idx1 elt)
      apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm)
      exact List.Perm.symm (List.perm_insertIdx l2 idx2 elt)

have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp [List.insertIdx]
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i <;> simp [List.insertIdx]
          exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih _)).trans (List.Perm.swap x elt xs)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)

apply List.Perm.trans (List.perm_insertIdx elt l1 idx1 hidx1)
      apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm)
      apply List.Perm.symm (List.perm_insertIdx elt l2 idx2 hidx2)

have aux : ∀ l i, (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        intro l i
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp [List.insertIdx]
        | cons x xs ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]
          | succ i =>
            dsimp [List.insertIdx]
            exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih i)).trans (List.Perm.swap elt x xs)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)
successful_attempts:
have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i ≤ l.length) : (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l) := by
        induction l generalizing i with
        | nil => simp at h; subst h; simp
        | cons hd tl ih =>
          cases i with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i =>
            simp
            exact (List.Perm.cons hd (ih i (Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ h))).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      exact (aux l1 idx1 hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)
